parameters:
...Master, what are you doing, leaving the young master to his own devices...? What
drives you to go to such lengths, even pushing yourself so hard...?
Oh, my apologies, guest. Is there something you need?

...If there's nothing, please note this is the master's room. I must ask you not to
wander around too much.
This is the master's room. Please refrain from wandering around too much.

You wish to meet the master...? I'm terribly sorry, but given his current health
condition... I must ask that you request an audience at another, more opportune time.

...This bastard isn't going to be any help. Maybe I should ask that librarian-san
instead...?
// ラストイベント＝2次の日
// ラストイベント＝2次の日

Thank you for saving my master the other day. My master is a duke of this Kingdom...
a distinguished contributor who ended the war with the demons.

Serving such an honorable master is our emotional support. To think what would have
happened without you is truly terrifying...
// ラストイベント＝2次の日
完了までウェイト = true
現在天候のコモンイベント実行
完了までウェイト = true
Oh, \n[1]. You saved me last time. Thanks to you, my life was spared.
Ah, no! It was nothing...! ...Wait, you know my name?

...Ah, well, I used to oversee the Adventurer's Guild in the old days. Through those
connections, I still hear news from within the guild. When it comes to \n[1] and Mana,
you're the top adventurer party in the royal capital, right?
Ah, haha... I'm honored by your praise...

The strongest S-rank adventurer in the royal capital... I never thought I'd meet you
in such a remote place. Did you come here on a request?

No, we're on a break right now... Mana and I were born and raised in this village, so
we're just visiting home.
A break... I see... That's perfect timing then.
There's something I want to show you. Come with me.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = LastEV_V3_00
